sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30149" key="e)gkataknakomigh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκατα-κνᾱκομῐγής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n30149.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compounded of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔγκατα</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">and</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κνάκων</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1601.tlg001:3:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philox.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
